codeReview.summary: The original zone-content-expansion commit was correctly failed in the prior scrutiny round because it shipped only data/types/tests and did not satisfy required runtime behavior. Reviewing the later follow-up commits shows those blocking gaps are now resolved: field NPCs spawn and are interactable in ZoneScene, hidden areas are discovered via fog-clearing and grant rewards, sub-dungeon entrances are interactable and exit back to the parent entrance position, and mini-boss loot quality floors now satisfy the hidden-area/sub-dungeon expectations tied to the original feature.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The content-worker skill still frames map/NPC work primarily as data creation and only says to ensure content is loadable, which did not match this feature's required in-game interaction scope. The original worker handoff explicitly marked runtime wiring undone despite the feature description requiring interactable entrances, discoverable hidden areas, and companion transfer.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/content-worker/SKILL.md step 5 says only 'Ensure content integrates correctly'; feature description in features.json:1188 requires hidden areas not on minimap until discovered, interactable sub-dungeon entrances, and companion transfer; handoff 2026-03-24T14-45-23-947Z__zone-content-expansion__8052722f-883c-4b4d-9650-8afc2b36808c.json says runtime wiring in ZoneScene was left undone.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The project library still documents stale exit behavior ('changeZone() ignores target coordinates') even though the scrutiny fix now relies on targetCol/targetRow-driven spawning for both normal exits and sub-dungeon returns. This is actionable shared knowledge that should be updated so future workers do not design around outdated semantics.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md 'Map Exit Coordinate Convention' says changeZone() ignores target coordinates; current implementation in src/scenes/ZoneScene.ts:2629-2643 passes targetCol/targetRow through restart and src/scenes/ZoneScene.ts:264-268 spawns the player from those values.

summary: Reviewed the original failing feature plus the later runtime and scrutiny-fix commits. The original commit alone was incomplete, but the current codebase now satisfies the previously blocking zone-content-expansion expectations for field NPC runtime presence, fog-based hidden-area discovery with rewards, interactable sub-dungeons with return-to-entrance flow, companion transfer continuity, and guaranteed enhanced mini-boss loot; no remaining blocking issues were found for this feature.
